summary: A Jest test assertion failed in test/config/get.ts within the pnpm package. The test expected the registry URL 'https://my-org.registry.example.com' but received 'https://my-org.registry.example.com/' (with a trailing slash), causing the test suite to exit with code 1.
root_cause: The test 'pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc' failed because pnpm config get now returns the scoped registry URL with a trailing slash, while the test asserts the value without a trailing slash.
relevant_tests: pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc

evidence.reason: Exact assertion mismatch — the received value has a trailing slash that the expected value does not, directly identifying the failure.
This is the failing assertion at test/config/get.ts:32, confirming it is a toBe equality check that fails due to the trailing slash difference.
Confirms the test file that failed and that it is a Jest test failure.

evidence.quote:
Test Suites: 1 failed, 3 skipped, 61 passed, 62 of 65 total
Tests:       1 failed, 9 skipped, 475 passed, 485 total
evidence.reason: Confirms exactly one test failed, consistent with the single assertion failure identified.
Confirms the CI job failed because the jest test command for the pnpm package exited with code 1.

suggested_fix: Update the assertion in test/config/get.ts at line 32 to expect the registry URL with a trailing slash ('https://my-org.registry.example.com/'), or fix the pnpm config get command to strip the trailing slash from scoped registry URLs before outputting them.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
